character_dossiers.name: John
character_dossiers.biography: He is the narrator who overhears a secret conversation in the apple barrel.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: He despises Captain Smollett and speaks sharply when addressed.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: He is a captain who speaks sharply and admits to being wrong about his crew.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: He is a doctor mentioned in dialogue about spoilage of the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: He is a former quartermaster who discusses his past with the cook.

character_dossiers.name: the youngest hand
character_dossiers.biography: He admires Silver and engages in dialogue about becoming a 'gentleman of fortune'.

character_dossiers.name: Israel Hands
character_dossiers.biography: He is a coxswain who speaks gruffly and submits to Silver's authority.

character_dossiers.name: the cook
character_dossiers.biography: He discusses his past with Silver and mentions his wife's possession of his money.
